span.p: Is the path fixed and the outcome must be identical every time?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Deterministic - Flow or Apex, not an agent

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does reasoning over varied input add real value?

span.p: Can the work be expressed as bounded topics + deterministic actions?
